positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a lone mountain range silhouette against a vibrant, gradient sky. The mountains are composed of deep navy and teal geometric shapes, suggesting both nature and abstract art. Include subtle elements like a crescent moon and stylized wind streaks. The composition must be centrally balanced and highly symmetrical. Style should be graphic novel art meets modern Scandinavian design. Use high contrast and flat color fields with dramatic, atmospheric lighting. Ideal for screen printing on t-shirts. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, noise, grain, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, logos, trademarks, realistic photography, celebrity
